message:
fix(core): eliminate TOCTOU race in ensure_symbol_segment and remove expect() on disk data

Replace exists() + fs::write() with atomic O_CREAT|O_EXCL via
OpenOptions::create_new(true) to prevent a concurrent process from
creating and populating the segment between the check and the write.

Replace expect("relative index fits u32") with map_err()?  in
build_systematic_run_locator so corrupt/oversized data returns an
error instead of panicking the process.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
